text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from an outing, Oguri Cap and I
swing by the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Something smells good... The shopping district
really makes my mouth water around this time of
day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Urk... I'm starving...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
How could I say no to a chance to win a deluxe
carrot hamburger steak?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
One time... Just once should be enough. You'll let
me try, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If I don't win anything, I'll drop it! So please!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I need to make the most of this opportunity. That
deluxe carrot hamburger steak is gonna be mine!
choice_data_list: Wait, we have to get a raffle ticket first!
Wait, we have to get a raffle ticket first!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A raffle ticket? How do we get one of those?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Got it. Then let's go buy a snack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so we obtain one raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nice! Let's hurry up and go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a steely look on her face, Oguri Cap takes
hold of the raffle spinner handle. I'm overcome
with a feeling similar to that of the pre-race
jitters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives it one powerful spin, and a small plastic
ball drops from the spinner's opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wow! A hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did I really win a trip to a hot spring?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Really? All I heard was "deluxe carrot hamburger
steak."
choice_data_list: Are you disappointed you didn't win that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...No, not at all. This is way better!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I love hot springs. I used to visit the hidden hot spring spots in my hometown all the time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So I get to go to a hot spring...
choice_data_list: Why don't you invite a friend?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A friend, huh? I wonder who'd wanna join me at a
hot spring. Who to ask, who to ask?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you think you can hold on to this coupon
for a while?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't think it really matters who I pick. I can't
ask anybody to just drop everything and go.
Everyone's got their own commitments—including
me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's best that you look after it for now. Knowing
me, I'll probably end up throwing it in the laundry
by mistake.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So please, could you hold on to it for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap makes a convincing argument, so I
agree to hold on to the hot spring trip coupon for
her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Whoaaa!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So this is the deluxe carrot hamburger steak! I
can't believe how big it is!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I wouldn't be so stupid as to eat it
here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But let's hurry back before I lose control and
swallow it whole!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do my best to keep up with Oguri Cap as she
speed walks off, and manage to partake in a
delicious feast with her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No way! A bushel of carrots?! What a great prize!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That said, I really wanted to eat that hamburger
steak...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Hold on.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A carrot hamburger steak is made with carrots.
Which means...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This is basically the same as winning the
hamburger steak! Yeah... I guess today's my lucky
day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I happily make our way back—our
arms full of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won third-prize!
Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: One... single... carrot...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I just remembered something.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There was this one time I got insanely hungry
back in my hometown when I was younger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was when I saw Shige by the side of the
road, and he gave me a single carrot to eat.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That one carrot tasted so much sweeter than any carrot I'd eaten before.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I bet this one tastes just the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Oguri Cap carefully nibble on the carrot
as we slowly make our way home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Tissues...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wonder if they'd be edible if I boiled them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I frantically try to console Oguri Cap before she
does something silly.
